title: secale montanum subsp. dalmaticum
intro: Secale montanum subsp. dalmaticum, also known as Dalmatian mountain ryegrass or Dalmatian rye grass, is a subspecies of the Secale montanum plant, a type of ryegrass native to the Balkans. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Dalmatian mountain ryegrass include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate respiratory problems. Dalmatian mountain ryegrass can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
